input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for TicketBatch.
input_context.default_vote_question: Infer the latest stable release source default vote from the source-backed amendment description only.

source_facts.claim: TicketBatch: This amendment adds Tickets as a way of sending transactions out of the typical sequence number order. Standards Draft: XLS-13d.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
TicketBatch appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 1.7.0.
